journal_entry.description: Purchase of machinery for factory expansion including freight, installation, and testing costs
journal_entry.rationale: Under IFRS (IAS 16), the cost of property, plant, and equipment includes the purchase price and all costs directly attributable to bringing the asset to the location and condition necessary for its intended use. This includes freight, installation, and testing costs. The machinery ($700,000) was purchased on account, while freight ($30,000), installation ($20,000), and testing ($50,000) were paid by cheque. Total capitalized cost is $800,000. HST at 13% applies to all components in Ontario.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Machinery purchase with all directly attributable costs capitalized per IAS 16. Purchase price on account ($700,000 + $91,000 HST), additional costs paid by cheque ($100,000 + $13,000 HST). Total machinery cost $800,000, total HST recoverable $104,000, accounts payable $791,000, cash paid $113,000.
